summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Badges & Gamification system and Push Notifications features for Jam Connexion. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages /badges and /notification-settings are fully functional with proper UI/UX.

minor.issue: Duplicate exception block at lines 220-222 (dead code after line 219 return statement)

passed_tests: API: POST /api/badges/initialize - Badge initialization (creates 13 default badges)
API: GET /api/badges/all - Get all badges with unlock status
API: GET /api/badges/my-badges - Get user's unlocked badges
API: GET /api/badges/stats - Get gamification stats (level, points, badges by tier)
API: POST /api/badges/check - Check and award badges automatically
API: Badges filtered by user role (venue sees venue/universal, musician sees musician/universal)
API: Badges endpoints require authentication (401 for unauthenticated)
API: GET /api/notifications/push/status - Get push notification status
API: POST /api/notifications/push/subscribe - Subscribe to push notifications
API: Message sending creates notification for recipient (push integration)
API: Friend request creates notification (push integration)
Frontend: /badges page loads with stats (Level, Points, Badges count)
Frontend: Badge tabs work (All, Unlocked, Locked)
Frontend: Badge cards display correctly with tier colors and progress bars
Frontend: Push notification settings with toggles for different notification types
critical_code_review_comments: Dead code in push_notifications.py line 220-222 (duplicate exception block) - non-blocking but should be cleaned up
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest run with prefix test_venue_badges_, test_musician_badges_, test_push_, test_msg_push_, test_friend_push_
context_for_next_testing_agent: Badges and Push Notifications systems are fully implemented and tested. 13 default badges defined in badges.py with 5 tiers (bronze, silver, gold, platinum, legendary). Push notifications use pywebpush with VAPID keys stored in /tmp/vapid_private.pem. The 'Pionnier' badge (Platinum, 500pts) is automatically awarded based on account_age requirement. Push notification errors don't block main actions (messages, friend requests, badge awards).

push_notifications.integration_message: Working - notification created on message send
push_notifications.integration_friend_request: Working - notification created on friend request

frontend_pages.badges_page: Fully functional with stats, tabs, badge cards
